Actions.Text: REPORTED AND COMMITTED TO ENERGY AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

Title: Prohibits incentives for the siting or operation of commercial renewable energy systems in sensitive environmental areas
Summary: Prohibits incentives for the siting or operation of commercial renewable energy systems in sensitive environmental areas.
LawCode: Amd §§151 & 323, Ag & Mkts L; amd §§2 & 66-p, Pub Serv L; amd §487, RPT L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the agriculture and markets law, the public service law and the real property tax law, in relation to prohibiting incentives for the siting or operation of commercial renewable energy systems in sensitive environmental areas
